sections_cited: section 34A of the Federal Excise Act

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. Federal Excise Reference Application No.426 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on CMA No. 2263/2022 2. For hearing of main case. 10.02.2026 Mr. Salman Abbasi Advocate, holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Tariq Masood, Advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2022 without any progress. Diary demonstrates that for four years the applicant has made no effort to even have this matter listed. On 23.12.2025 when the matter came up, an adjournment was sought by the learned counsel and the same was granted. Today brief is being held and adjournment is being sought once again without any cogent reason demonstrated to perpetuate clogging the docket. Therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 34A of the Federal Excise Act, 2005. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
